About Us

Over 20 years creating unforgettable experiences on the Pacific

Our Story

Where Playa Hermosa Meets Paradise

Long before Playa Hermosa became one of Costa Rica's most sought-after beach destinations, Terraza del Pacifico was welcoming travelers to a stretch of coastline unlike anywhere else in the world.

For more than two decades, we have been more than just a hotel—we have been a place where guests disconnect from the noise of everyday life and reconnect with what truly matters: nature, family, adventure, and unforgettable moments.

Nestled between the lush rainforest and the powerful Pacific Ocean, Terraza del Pacifico offers a rare experience that few destinations can match. Here, there are no crowded streets separating you from the beach. No barriers between you and the ocean. Just golden sand, rolling surf, breathtaking sunsets, and the natural beauty of Playa Hermosa right outside your door.

Over the years, thousands of travelers from around the world have chosen Terraza as their home in Costa Rica. Some arrive seeking adventure. Others come searching for relaxation. Many return year after year because they discover something special that cannot be found in larger resorts or crowded tourist destinations. It's found in the warmth of our team. It's found in the sound of the waves outside your room. It's found in watching the sun disappear into the Pacific while sharing a meal with family and friends.

Today, Terraza del Pacifico continues to honor the natural beauty and laid-back spirit that made Playa Hermosa famous while creating unforgettable experiences for every guest who walks through our doors. Whether you're here for a romantic escape, a family vacation, a wedding celebration, a surfing adventure, or simply a chance to slow down and breathe, we invite you to experience Costa Rica the way it was meant to be experienced.

Welcome to Terraza del Pacifico. Where memories are made, sunsets are unforgettable, and every stay becomes part of our story.

A Unique Pool in Central America

Designed by a renowned Italian artist, our main pool is a functional work of art that combines technology and nature in an extraordinary way.

With 1,200 LED lights integrated into the bottom, the pool evokes a starry sky underwater. Every night, the lights create a visual spectacle that transforms night swimming into a magical and unforgettable experience.

This aquatic work of art is not only beautiful but also functional. The low-energy LED technology reflects our commitment to sustainability without sacrificing our guests' experience.

Privileged Location
Whale Watching

During the season (July to October), majestic humpback whales visit our shores, offering an unforgettable natural spectacle.

Turtle Nesting

Playa Hermosa is a protected area where sea turtles come to nest, a unique conservation experience.

Surrounded by mountains covered in tropical vegetation, our hotel offers an exceptional natural environment where Costa Rican biodiversity manifests in all its splendor.

Tropical birds, howler monkeys, and a variety of local fauna make every day an adventure of discovery. The connection with nature is constant and authentic.

Weddings and Beachfront Events

Celebrate the most important moments of your life in our beachfront space. Discover all our options for events, weddings, and special celebrations.
